title: Release Note: Lifecycle Traceability Through Outcome Review
summary: This release extends the canonical ProductOS lifecycle trace through launch preparation, governed release communication, and post-release outcome review.

claims.claim: This release extends the canonical ProductOS lifecycle trace through launch preparation, governed release communication, and post-release outcome review.

classification_rationale: The release expands the stable ProductOS lifecycle claim from bounded release readiness to full launch and outcome traceability.
known_limitations: External publication adapters still remain a later bounded extension beyond the core lifecycle trace claim.
followup_support_path: Use the lifecycle trace review docs and validation records before broadening external publication claims.
